---
title: Derive custom composite intervals
lang: en-GB
embed-resources: true
minimal: true
code-fold: true
theme: lumen
params:
  horizon_years: 20
  create_rds_file: true
  rds_filename: example
  include_zero_mitigation: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
source("functions.R")
horizon_years <- as.integer(params[["horizon_years"]])
rds_fname <- sub("(\\.rds)+$", ".rds", paste0(params[["rds_filename"]], ".rds"))
token <- azkit::get_auth_token()
```

```{r}
#| label: github-tpma-data
tpma_data <- get_tpma_data()
```

```{r}
#| label: azure-modelruns-data
# fmt: skip
table_cols <- c(
  "dataset", "scenario", "start_year", "end_year", "app_version", "run_stage",
  "aggregated_results_path", "results_json_gz_path"
)

# fmt: skip
run_stages <- c(
  "validation_report_ndg2", "validation_report_ndg3",
  "final_report_ndg2", "final_report_ndg3"
)

runs_table <- azkit::read_azure_table("modelruns", token = token) |>
  dplyr::select(tidyselect::all_of(table_cols)) |>
  dplyr::filter(dplyr::if_any("run_stage", \(x) x %in% {{ run_stages }})) |>
  dplyr::slice_min(
    match(.data[["run_stage"]], {{ run_stages }}),
    by = "dataset"
  )

n_schemes_included <- nrow(runs_table)
```

Number of schemes with runs included in dataset: `r n_schemes_included`

```{r}
#| label: azure-nee-data
nee_intervals <- get_nee_intervals(Sys.getenv("AZ_SUPPORT_CONTAINER"), token) |>
  # only include current approved set of strategies
  dplyr::inner_join(tpma_data, c("type", "change_factor", "strategy"))
```


```{r}
#| label: interval-extraction
combined_intervals_tbl <- runs_table |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    results_path = dplyr::coalesce(
      .data[["aggregated_results_path"]],
      .data[["results_json_gz_path"]]
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(c("dataset", "results_path")) |>
  tibble::deframe() |>
  purrr::map(\(x) read_params(x, Sys.getenv("AZ_RESULTS_CONTAINER"), token)) |>
  purrr::map(\(x) purrr::keep_at(x, c("activity_avoidance", "efficiencies"))) |>
  purrr::map_depth(2, create_intervals_tbl) |>
  purrr::map(\(x) purrr::list_rbind(x, names_to = "change_factor")) |>
  purrr::list_rbind(names_to = "dataset") |>
  # only include current approved set of strategies
  dplyr::inner_join(tpma_data, c("type", "change_factor", "strategy"))
```


```{r}
#| label: remove-inapplicable-rows
# create data subset of values that have been agreed to be inapplicable
remove_rows <- combined_intervals_tbl |>
  dplyr::select(c("dataset", "strategy")) |>
  dplyr::filter(
    (.data[["dataset"]] == "RH5" &
      .data[["strategy"]] == "virtual_wards_activity_avoidance_ari") |
      (.data[["dataset"]] == "RAS" &
        (grepl("adult_non-surgical$", .data[["strategy"]]) |
          .data[["strategy"]] == "pre-op_los_1-day")) |
      (.data[["dataset"]] == "RGN" &
        grepl("^discharged_no_treatment_.*_ambulance$", .data[["strategy"]])) |
      (.data[["dataset"]] == "RTX" &
        .data[["strategy"]] %in%
          c(
            "stroke_early_supported_discharge",
            "virtual_wards_efficiencies_ari",
            "raid_ip",
            "virtual_wards_efficiencies_heart_failure"
          )) |
      (.data[["dataset"]] == "RBT" &
        grepl("^same_day_emergency_care_.*high$", .data[["strategy"]])) |
      (.data[["dataset"]] == "RCX" &
        .data[["strategy"]] == "same_day_emergency_care_low")
  )

tidy_intervals_tbl <- combined_intervals_tbl |>
  dplyr::anti_join(remove_rows, c("dataset", "strategy")) |>
  dplyr::filter(dplyr::if_all(c("p10", "p90"), \(x) dplyr::between(x, 0, 1)))
```


```{r}
#| label: tpma-contributions-table
tidy_intervals_tbl |>
  dplyr::rename(TPMA = "strategy") |>
  dplyr::count(.data[["TPMA"]], sort = TRUE, name = "schemes") |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gt::tab_header("Number of schemes providing valid intervals for each TPMA")
```

```{r}
#| label: annualise-scheme-intervals
# fmt: skip
remove_cols <- c(
  "dataset", "scenario", "app_version", "run_stage",
  "aggregated_results_path", "results_json_gz_path"
)
annualised_intervals_tbl <- tidy_intervals_tbl |>
  dplyr::left_join(runs_table, "dataset") |>
  dplyr::select(!tidyselect::all_of(remove_cols)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    period = .data[["end_year"]] - .data[["start_year"]],
    .keep = "unused"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(c("p10", "p90"), \(x) annualise(x, .data[["period"]])),
    .keep = "unused"
  )

nee_period <- 20 # years between baseline and horizon, fixed for NEE estimates

annualised_nee_intervals <- nee_intervals |>
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(c("p10", "p90"), \(x) annualise(x, nee_period)))
```


```{r}
#| label: create-mixtures-across-schemes
#| warning: false
scheme_mixtures_tbl <- annualised_intervals_tbl |>
  create_mixtures(c("change_factor", "type", "strategy"))
```

```{r}
#| label: pluck-intervals-from-mixtures
scheme_intervals <- scheme_mixtures_tbl |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    p10 = purrr::map_dbl(.data[["mixture"]], \(m) m@q(p = 0.1)),
    p90 = purrr::map_dbl(.data[["mixture"]], \(m) m@q(p = 0.9)),
    .keep = "unused"
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: annualised-value-reinflation
init_joined_table <- list(scheme_intervals, annualised_nee_intervals) |>
  rlang::set_names(c("schemes", "nee")) |>
  dplyr::bind_rows(.id = "source")

final_joined_table <- horizon_years |>
  purrr::map(\(x) reinflate_intervals(x, init_joined_table)) |>
  rlang::set_names(paste0(horizon_years, "yr")) |>
  purrr::list_rbind(names_to = "period") |>
  # pivot_wider creates NA values in the table, where we are missing a NEE value
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = c("source", "period"),
    names_glue = "{source}_{period}_{.value}",
    values_from = c("p10", "p90")
  ) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    tidyselect::matches("p[19]0$"),
    names_to = c("source", "period", "name"),
    names_sep = "_",
    cols_vary = "slowest"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across("type", \(x) {
    forcats::fct(x, c("ip", "op", "aae"))
  })) |>
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::pick(c(
    "type",
    "change_factor",
    "strategy",
    "period",
    "source"
  ))) |>
  # fill missing NEE values with scheme values as a fallback
  tidyr::fill(
    "value",
    .by = c("type", "change_factor", "strategy", "period", "name"),
    .direction = "up" # "nee" rows will be above "schemes" rows per group
  ) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider()
```

```{r}
#| label: convert-table-to-named-list
scenario_data <- final_joined_table |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    interval = purrr::map2(.data[["p10"]], .data[["p90"]], \(x, y) {
      list(interval = c(x, y))
    }),
    .keep = "unused"
  ) |>
  tidyr::unite("scenario", c("source", "period"))

if (params[["include_zero_mitigation"]]) {
  zero_mitigation_tbl <- tpma_data |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      dplyr::across("type", \(x) forcats::fct(x, c("ip", "op", "aae"))),
      scenario = "zero_mitigation",
      interval = purrr::map(nrow(tpma_data), \(x) list(interval = c(1L, 1L)))
    )
  scenario_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(scenario_data, zero_mitigation_tbl)
}

intervals_list <- scenario_data |>
  tidyr::nest(.by = "scenario") |>
  tibble::deframe()
```

```{r}
#| label: data-export
#| eval: !expr params[["create_rds_file"]]
readr::write_rds(intervals_list, rds_fname)
```

```{r}
#| label: generate-params
#| eval: false
model_version <- "v5.1"
config_file <- modparams::get_config_filepath(model_version)
seed <- 1598L

intervals_tbl <- intervals_list |>
  dplyr::bind_rows(.id = "scenario") |>
  tidyr::nest(.by = "scenario", .key = "intervals_data")

if (params[["include_zero_mitigation"]]) {
  scenario_labels <- c("NEE", "composite", "zero")
} else {
  scenario_labels <- c("NEE", "composite")
}
l <- length(scenario_labels)
ndg_variants <- rep(c(2, 3), each = l)
s <- paste0("-", rep(scenario_labels, times = l))
scenarios <- paste0(Sys.Date(), "-National-NDG", ndg_variants, s)

setup_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(intervals_tbl, intervals_tbl) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    config = config_file,
    scenario = scenarios,
    dataset = "national",
    user = "nhp.devs",
    seed = seed,
    end_year = 2043L,
    model_runs = 512L,
    ndg_variant = paste0("ndg", ndg_variants)
  )

files_out <- purrr::pmap_chr(setup_tbl, modparams::write_params_json)
modparams::validate_files(files_out, model_version)
```
